subcodes.first_line: O ye leaves who are attracted! His honor Mírzá Ḥájí Áqá requested the writing of a letter to these leaves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقات منجذبات جناب میرزا حاجی آقا خواهش نگارش نامه نمود که این ورقات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @eulogies; reminiscences, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
